title: Sonna Puriyathu Lyrics Velayutham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vijay Antony, Veera Shankar
Song: Sonna Puriyadhu
Lyrics: Annamalai
Movie: Velayutham
Music : Vijay Antony

Andam nadunadunga, aagaasam kidukidunga
Chennai sangamathil thanga medlu vaangiya naanga
Kaarakudi karakaata Gostithaane ..
Kumbittu koopidurom, koothaada vaarumaiyya
Kaaveri neera pola salanga mani kulungi nikka
Thanjaavuru thappaata kuluvirukku
panja kodi parakka paathu neeyum vaarumaiya
Aatathil kodi paraka aasaaney aadumaiya

Tharu pidichu naadhasuvaram,
Vaaru pidicha urumi melam
Thirunalveli seemai aaalum kodalamaada saami aattam
Sokkaney soorakaatha sulandu sulandu aadumaiyaa..
Sokki vilum namma koottam super-a-thaan paadumaiyaa
Sokkaney soorakaatha vaarumaiyaa ..

[Sonna puriyaadhu, sollukul adangaadhu
neengellam en mela vacha paasam] (2)
Onna pirandhaalum idhupola irukaadhu
Naa unga mela-ellaam vacha nesam

Meenuthila maiyma, ellundhu varra yelaisa
Yepulla meenakshi athaan varraan thookiko..

Velayutham peru,en pathu viral velu
Nikkathu indha kaalu, kottirichu da thaelu

Sonna puriyaadhu, sollukul adangaadhu
neengellam en mela vacha paasam
Onna pirandhaalum idhupola irukaadhu
Naa unga mela-ellaam vacha nesam

Meenuthila maiyma, ellundhu varra yelaisa
Yepulla meenakshi athaan varraan thookika..
Gula ye gulsa Gula ye gulsa
Gula ye gulsa, Gula ye gulsa
Jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim
jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim
Jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim
jimmuku jimmuku jim

.... how you control me
Better you fold me, everyday...nananey.
Osandha malayeri, emmela nee yeri
Kudikka kalleraki malara ne kudikuraye ..

Thalayil aadum karagam irukkum
Thalayil ganam thaan irundhadhilla
Thaara thappattom aatamthaan irukum
Thappaana aatam naan potathilla
Puli vesam pottukuttu, puli aatam aadiriken
Vetayaadi mattum naan vazhndhadhu illa
Sandaiyila MGR-ru, saatayila ayaanaaru
Dhillirukum thappu sanda potathu illa

Meenunalla maiyma, ellundhu varra yelaisa
Yevala meenakshi akka varraa thookiko..
Gula ye gulsa Gula ye gulsa

Varappa midhichu raapagalaa olachu
Vazhura jananga namma kachi
Ivanga manasa sandhosa padutha
Thappu nee senjaalum right-u machi

Aadukira aatathuku koodukira kootathuku
kaiyeduthu ippa naanum kumbuduren
Unga veetu chella pilla, ennapola yaarumila
Ungalathaan eppavume nambiduren

Meenunalla maiyma, ellundhu varra yelaisa
Yevala meenakshi akka varraa thookiko..

Sonna puriyaadhu, sollukul adangaadhu
neengellam en mela vacha paasam

Naa unga mela-ellaam vacha nesam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sonna Puriyathu'?

The song conveys a message of joy and celebration, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Velayutham'?

Velayutham revolves around a common man who becomes a hero to fight against injustice, and this song highlights the celebratory moments in his journey.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features Veera Shankar and Vijay Antony as singers, with Vijay Antony also serving as the music director.

When was 'Sonna Puriyathu' released?

The song was released on August 28, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sonna Puriyathu, the energetic beats and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song is a pivotal moment in Velayutham, showcasing the protagonist's journey and the happiness of his supporters. With its catchy rhythm and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of excitement and camaraderie. This track is perfect for uplifting moods and energizing gatherings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sonna Puriyathu from Velayutham is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and energy. With the dynamic collaboration of Veera Shankar and Vijay Antony, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious beats and catchy lyrics that make this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Beautifully moving, the sky is shining. We, who have brought the gold medal to Chennai, are like the Kaarakudi drum. We will call out loudly, dancing with joy. Like the flowing Kaveri, we will shine and stand out. In Thanjavur, the flag will fly high, and you too will dance with joy.

Holding the drum, the music plays. The sound of the urumi is heard. In Tirunelveli, the festival is celebrated with joy. The crowd dances happily. Our group sings beautifully. The joy of the crowd is undeniable.
[It cannot be understood, it cannot be contained, the love you all have for me.] Even if you are born, it cannot be the same. I have love for all of you.
In the fish pond, the truth comes from everywhere. Meenakshi comes to take it away.
The name Velayutham, my ten fingers are strong. Don't let this leg rest, keep it moving.
It cannot be understood, it cannot be contained, the love you all have for me. Even if you are born, it cannot be the same. I have love for all of you.

In the fish pond, the truth comes from everywhere. Meenakshi comes to take it away. Gula ye gulsa Gula ye gulsa Gula ye gulsa, Gula ye gulsa Jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim Jimmuku jimmuku jimmuku jim jimmuku jimmuku jim
...how you control me. Better you fold me, every day...nananey. The flower blooms, you rise above. You drink the nectar of the flower.

There is a dance on the head. The song is not there. The star is dancing. I did not dance wrongly. I wear the tiger mask and dance. I have not lived only for the fight. In the fight, MGR is there, and there is no mistake in the fight.
In the fish pond, the truth comes from everywhere. Meenakshi comes to take it away. Gula ye gulsa Gula ye gulsa
They will come to check and see. The people will gather around us. Their hearts will be filled with happiness. Even if you make a mistake, it will be right, my friend.
For the dance, I join the group and now I am also dancing. No one is like you in your house. I always trust you.
In the fish pond, the truth comes from everywhere. Meenakshi comes to take it away.
It cannot be understood, it cannot be contained, the love you all have for me. Even if you are born, it cannot be the same. I have love for all of you.
In the fish pond, the truth comes from everywhere. Meenakshi comes to take it away.
The name Velayutham, my ten fingers are strong. Don't let this leg rest, keep it moving.
